examples: Closeness, for example, indicates intimacy or threat to many speakers.
Intimacy is the feeling of closeness, of connectedness with someone, of bonding.
The closeness this system cultivates is reinforced by the institution of "advisory" classes.
For her project, Kern says, she used only a wide-angle lens to reflect the closeness of her subjects.
That closeness generated more personal anguish for the filmmakers than dispassionate observers usually undergo.
